ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data collection */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in miles */,
  "dry_bulb_temp_f" REAL /* Dry bulb temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "wet_bulb_temp_f" REAL /* Wet bulb temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "dew_point_temp_f" REAL /* Dew point temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "relative_humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "station_pressure" REAL /* Station pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Sea level pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Data quality flag to indicate data validity */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual, automated, imported) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in feet */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., land, sea, upper-air) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used to collect data (e.g., anemometer, barometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Boundary coordinates of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if data was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_region" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the station belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_versioning" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "version")
)
